problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
hypothesis: The key to What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? is Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells — specifically Telomerase activation/inhibition in — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
